name: llm-wiki
description: LLM-compiled knowledge base plugin. Natural language routing, session resume, concurrent-safe indexes, topic-isolated wikis, parallel multi-agent research, thesis mode (--mode thesis), repo assessment, Obsidian dual-linking, lint-as-migration, retardmax mode, and --min-time sustained research.

plugins.name: wiki
plugins.description: LLM-compiled knowledge base with fidelity guardrails on ingestion (verbatim body, unknown > guessed, verification pass). Commands: /wiki (natural language router + init/status), /wiki:ingest, /wiki:compile, /wiki:query, /wiki:research, /wiki:assess, /wiki:plan, /wiki:lint, /wiki:output, /wiki:retract, /wiki:project.
